## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / packaging
- [ ] Other

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Manual validation in the Extension Development Host

## Checklist

- [ ] I used fictional examples only.
- [ ] I did not include proprietary code, credentials or customer data.
- [ ] I updated documentation/changelog when applicable.
